narrative_beat: Medium dez figuras coroadas ajoelhadas diante de besta sombria

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: ten crowned figures in crimson and ochre royal robes kneeling in a row before a massive shadowy beast silhouette, its seven heads barely visible in the background darkness, a stone wall behind the beast bearing the verse inscription
subject.focal_point: the ten kneeling crowned figures in submission
subject.secondary: Massive beast silhouette behind in monochrome. Verse carved in stone wall behind beast.
props: ten crowned figures in crimson and ochre robes

environment.atmosphere: prophetic submission, kings surrendering to the Beast

composition.foreground: ten kings in vivid crimson, ochre and gold
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white stone wall with verse inscription

lighting.key_light: torchlight from walls illuminating the kneeling kings

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: prophetic submission, the kings willingly surrender their power

symbolism.primary: Revelation 17:13 — they have one purpose and give their power to the Beast
symbolism.secondary: ten kings as modern power brokers bowing to a greater force

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

in_scene_text.content: Estes tem um mesmo intento, e entregarao o seu poder e autoridade a besta.
in_scene_text.medium: etched in stone wall behind the kneeling kings
in_scene_text.placement: upper background behind the beast silhouette

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.

api_call_hints.critical_note_for_gemini: The text in quotes MUST be rendered exactly as written, letter by letter, in the specified font style. This is a Bible verse and accuracy is sacred.
